name: codersmu
description: Exploratory CLI client for coders.mu in the codersmu-clients workspace

scripts.build:all: pnpm build:core && pnpm build:api && pnpm build
scripts.install:cli: pnpm build:core && pnpm build && npm link
scripts.install:macos: sh -c 'command -v xcodegen >/dev/null || { echo "xcodegen is required. Install it with: brew install xcodegen" >&2; exit 1; }; cd apps/macos && xcodegen generate'
scripts.build:macos: pnpm install:macos && xcodebuild -project apps/macos/CodersmuMenuBar.xcodeproj -scheme CodersmuMenuBar -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath apps/macos/.derived-data CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm --filter @codersmu/core check && pnpm --filter @codersmu/api check && pnpm build
scripts.deploy:api: pnpm build:core && pnpm build:api && pnpm deploy --filter @codersmu/api --prod --legacy
